page.content: In FY2023, the Municipal debt service ratios are detailed as follows: CityA has a TotalDebt of $500M, DebtService of $50M, with RevenueSources comprising PropertyTax of $200M, SalesTax of $100M, and a TotalRevenue of $850M, resulting in a DebtRatio of 5.9% and a NetIncome of unspecified amount; CityB shows TotalDebt of $300M, DebtService of $30M, with RevenueSources including PropertyTax of $150M, SalesTax of $70M, and TotalRevenue of $550M, leading to a DebtRatio of 5.5% and a NetIncome of unspecified amount; CityC lists TotalDebt at $400M, DebtService of $40M, with RevenueSources of PropertyTax at $180M, SalesTax of $60M, yielding TotalRevenue of $680M, establishing a DebtRatio of 5.9% and a NetIncome of unspecified amount; CityD has TotalDebt of $600M, DebtService of $60M, RevenueSources including PropertyTax of $220M, SalesTax of $90M, resulting in TotalRevenue of $970M, calculated to a DebtRatio of 6.2% and a NetIncome of unspecified amount; CityE reports TotalDebt of $250M, DebtService of $25M, with RevenueSources of PropertyTax at $100M, SalesTax of $50M, resulting in TotalRevenue of $425M, and a DebtRatio of 5.9% with an unspecified NetIncome; CityF has TotalDebt of $350M, DebtService of $35M, RevenueSources of PropertyTax at $130M, SalesTax at $40M, totaling a Revenue of $555M, with a DebtRatio of 6.3% and an unspecified NetIncome; CityG has TotalDebt of $450M, DebtService of $45M, with RevenueSources of PropertyTax at $195M, SalesTax at $75M, resulting in TotalRevenue of $765M, leading to a DebtRatio of 5.9% and an unspecified NetIncome; CityH shows TotalDebt of $550M, DebtService of $55M, with RevenueSources of PropertyTax at $210M, SalesTax at $85M, with TotalRevenue of $900M, establishing a DebtRatio of 6.1% and an unspecified NetIncome; CityI lists TotalDebt of $700M, DebtService of $70M, with RevenueSources of PropertyTax at $300M, SalesTax at $100M, resulting in TotalRevenue of $1170M, establishing a DebtRatio of 6.0% and an unspecified NetIncome; finally, CityJ has TotalDebt of $800M, DebtService of $80M, with RevenueSources of PropertyTax at $400M, SalesTax at $120M, totaling a Revenue of $1400M, yielding a DebtRatio of 6.3% and an unspecified NetIncome..
